tags.name: Churchyard of St. Ann Blackfriars
tags.note: Open from 8am to 7pm or dusk (whichever is the earlier) on weekdays throughout the year, and on weekends between 1 Apr and 30 Sep except 25 Dec, 26 Dec and 1 Jan
tags.wheelchair:description:en: Access not possible, only access is via a steep staircase
